title: The Lesser Pilgrimage of Fulfillment
description: According to Ibn Humayd- Salamah-Ibn Ishaq, who said:556 When the Messenger of God returned to Medina from Khaybar, he 55o. 'Abd al-Wabid b. Abi 'Awn al -Dawsi was born in Medina and died in 144/761-62. See Ibn Hajar, Tahdhib, VI, 438. 551. Yumn (Yaqut, Mu'jam al-buldan, VIII, 524) was a watering place of Gharafan between Barn Qaww and Ru'af, on the road between Tayma ' and Fayd; alJinab was near Khaybar (ibid., III, r30-31). 552. A Yabya b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 08
